message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Urgent: commit all uncommitted work now">
Luca — urgent: none of the work from Tasks 1, 2, or 3 has been committed yet. There's a large amount of uncommitted code, CSS, docs, and config in the working directory. Please commit this work immediately in logical, small commits:

1. First commit: project scaffolding (Cargo.toml, src structure, docker-compose, config, flake.nix, .gitignore)
2. Second commit: walking skeleton (health check endpoint + integration test)
3. Third commit: design tokens (static/css/main.css)
4. Fourth commit: product docs (docs/user-stories.md, docs/future-ideas.md, docs/glossary.md)

After each commit, run `cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo test` to make sure everything is green. Then push and verify CI passes with `gh run list`.

Going forward: commit every time the tests pass. Never accumulate this much uncommitted work.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Good news -- the working tree is already clean. All work from Tasks 1-9 and 20 was committed and pushed in prior sessions. There is nothing uncommitted.

CI status:
- `Add integration tests for edit todo title feature (US-8)` -- passed
- `Update glossary with edit and delete todo actions` -- passed
- `Add delete integration tests and edit todo scaffolding` -- passed

All green. Will follow the commit-early-and-often discipline going forward -- commit immediately after every green test run, verify CI, then move on.
